resolution_details.approach: Created pre-entrypoint script that runs as root to fix volume mount permissions, then switches to node user
changes_made: Created docker/pre-entrypoint.sh - runs as root to fix node_modules ownership before switching to node user
Updated Dockerfile to install su-exec and use pre-entrypoint.sh as CMD
Removed sudo dependencies from entrypoint.sh (no longer needed)
Verified full entrypoint flow: pre-entrypoint (root) -> entrypoint (node) -> Claude Code (node)

validation.user_switch: ✅ Successfully switched to node user (UID 1000) after permission fixes
validation.pnpm_install: ✅ pnpm install ran without EACCES errors (progressed to 1448/1455 packages)
validation.claude_code: ✅ Claude Code runs successfully with --dangerously-skip-permissions as node user
validation.test_command: docker exec -u node claude-migration-test bash -c "echo 'Test' | claude code run --dangerously-skip-permissions"

notes: The ENFILE (file table overflow) error during pnpm install is a Docker Desktop on Mac limitation, not a permissions issue
ENFILE does not block Claude Code execution - the migration can proceed
When using docker exec, must specify '-u node' to run commands as node user
Container processes (entrypoint, tail) correctly run as node user (verified with ps aux)
